summary: The diff modifies backend/main.mo, OpenOrdersPanel.tsx, useQueries.ts, and supporting files. REQ-3 frontend changes are clearly present. However, backend/main.mo is truncated, making full verification of REQ-1 and REQ-2 acceptance criteria impossible from the available evidence.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix the backend order cancellation logic so that all previously placed grid orders are correctly identified and cancelled on ICDex before new orders are placed or the bot halts; cancellation failures are logged; no duplicate or orphaned orders remain.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is truncated before the cancellation logic (cancelAllOpenOrders, stopBot, grid refresh cycle) is visible. The actual cancellation-before-reposition loop, error logging on cancellation failure, and orphan-prevention logic cannot be confirmed from the visible portion.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix the backend order repositioning logic so that after cancellation, the bot recalculates grid price levels and places new buy/sell orders at updated positions; activity log records each repositioning cycle with orders cancelled and placed; per-level errors are logged and bot continues.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is truncated before the recurringTimer/grid placement logic is visible. The recalculation of grid levels from mid price and spread, per-level error logging with continuation, and activity log entries for repositioning cycles cannot be confirmed from the visible portion.
